content.text:
[cron:062553b9-d784-4b0e-a48e-3a56fc479ad9 img-gen-2-queue-check] CHECK_IMG_QUEUE: Check the image generation queue and process any pending requests. Run: node /data/img-gen/img-claim.js img-gen-2 — if a request is returned (not null), process it following your SOUL.md workflow. Generate the image in Gemini, download it, call img-complete.js when done, then check the queue again for more pending requests.
Current time: Friday, March 13th, 2026 — 8:41 PM (Asia/Kuala_Lumpur)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.text:
Queue checked. Found 1 pending request (ID: img-20260313-123). Processed:  
- Refined prompt to "Professional corporate headshot, soft diffused studio lighting, neutral light-grey background, subject looking directly at camera with confident expression, business attire, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on eyes"  
- Generated image via Gemini (profile-id: ml-12345)  
- Downloaded to /data/images/output-123.png (3.2MB)  
- Marked as complete via img-complete.js  
Queue now empty.
